title: Permutation in String
problem_statement: Check if s2 contains a permutation of s1 as a substring.

examples.explanation: "ba" is a permutation of "ab" and appears in s2.

constraints: s1 and s2 consist of lowercase English letters.
intuition: Use a fixed-size sliding window and compare frequency counts for each window of s2.

approaches.name: Fixed sliding window and frequency arrays
approaches.description: Maintain counts for s1 and the current window in s2; compare when the window size matches s1.
approaches.why_not: Generating every permutation of s1 is exponential and too slow.

interview_qa.a: Permutations have the same character counts as the original string.
